<?php /** * This file has been @generated by a phing task by {@link GeneratePhonePrefixData}. * See [README.md](README.md#generating-data) for more information. * * Pull requests changing data in these files will not be accepted. See the * [FAQ in the README](README.md#problems-with-invalid-numbers] on how to make * metadata changes. * * Do not modify this file directly! */ return [ 96311 => 'Damascus and rural areas', 96312 => 'Al-Nebek', 96313 => 'Al-Zabadani', 96314 => 'Al-Quneitra', 96315 => 'Dara', 96316 => 'Al-Swedaa', 96321 => 'Aleppo', 96322 => 'Al-Rakkah', 96323 => 'Edleb', 96325 => 'Menbej', 96331 => 'Homs', 96333 => 'Hamah', 96334 => 'Palmyra', 96341 => 'Lattakia', 96343 => 'Tartous', 96344 => 'Hamah', 96351 => 'Deir Ezzour', 96352 => 'Alhasakah', 96353 => 'Al-Kameshli', ];
